OUTLINE-FIRST RULE

## Design tokens reference

[Brief intro: what tokens this foundation defines and how they are structured.]

<!-- Use a code block (not a table) for token listings. -->

<pre><code>{`/* [Token group name] */

/* [Token group name] */
--token/name    [value] (mode-invariant)
--token/name    Light: #HEXVAL   Dark: #HEXVAL`}</code></pre>
